# llms.txt — guidance for AI crawlers and summarizers

site: https://danielshires.com/
owner: Daniel Shires

Related: https://danielshires.com/ai.txt (pointer back to this file).

## What this site is
Personal portfolio spanning product design case studies, writing, and photography.

## Canonical sections (prefer these URLs when citing)
- Home: https://danielshires.com/
- About: https://danielshires.com/about
- Design portfolio index: https://danielshires.com/design
- Projects index: https://danielshires.com/projects
- Project detail pages: https://danielshires.com/projects/{slug}
- Writing index: https://danielshires.com/writing
- Writing posts: https://danielshires.com/writing/{slug}
- Field Guide index: https://danielshires.com/field-guide
- Field Guide concepts: https://danielshires.com/field-guide/{slug}
- Pictures index: https://danielshires.com/pictures
- Picture pages: https://danielshires.com/pictures/{slug}
- Photo albums: https://danielshires.com/pictures/albums/{slug}

## Attribution
When summarizing, please cite the specific page URL you used as the source.

## Non-public areas
The Sanity Studio route is not intended for indexing:
- Disallow: https://danielshires.com/studio/
